inputs.name: q
inputs.desc: Query tensor [heads, tokens, head_dim] to be rotated in-place

inputs.name: k
inputs.desc: Key tensor [kv_heads, tokens, head_dim] to be rotated in-place

weights.name: rope_freqs
weights.desc: Optional proportional RoPE frequency factors; ignored when use_rope_freq_factors=0

outputs.name: q
outputs.desc: Query tensor after split-half RoPE application

outputs.name: k
outputs.desc: Key tensor after split-half RoPE application

impl.c_declaration: void rope_forward_qk_split_direct_f32(float *q, float *k, const float *freq_factors, int use_freq_factors, int num_heads, int num_kv_heads, int num_tokens, int head_dim, int aligned_head_dim, int pos_offset, int rotary_dim, float freq_base);

parity.notes: Validated against HF split-half rotate_half semantics for direct per-layer theta RoPE.

notes: Generic split-half direct RoPE for models that need per-layer theta/rotary_dim and optional frequency factors instead of one precomputed cache. Gemma4 is the first v8 user, but the contract is model-neutral.
